race.comment: SISTER SHAY (13) gritty on-pace Wodonga-trained mare set to peak fourth-up. Nailed late two-back, before jumping in class with a respectable sixth over 1400m at Bendigo in the Gold Bracelet. Ticks plenty of boxes today from the low draw. JUST GLAMOUROUS (9) nice mare who can go through the grades this time in. Shouldered the 62kg second-up with a game second over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Drops 4kg in weight for this and Hyeronimus sticks from a good gate. Leading contender. JELLICIOUS (4) failed to back-up the good first-up run with a fading eighth over 1200m at this track. Ready for the 1400m now and anywhere near her best can see her play a leading role. SURF'S UP (12) kept fresh for this and gives every indication she will appreciate this trip. Since fitted with a 900m trial and can overcome the gate. GIRIJAALA (11) kept fresh and will relish the going. Went out fast and knocked up in the straight with a disappointing fifth over 1600m at Warwick Farm. Trip suits and can bounce back.
